headline: Texas Instruments (TXN) Stock After Capacity Expansion Push Is The Price Still Justified
summary: If you are wondering whether Texas Instruments stock still offers value at around US$304.36, it helps to break the story into recent returns, news flow and what different valuation checks are signaling. The stock has been relatively steady over the past week with a 0.8% return, slightly softer over the last month with a 1.6% decline, and shows longer term returns of 71.5% year to date and 52.4% over the past year. Recent coverage has focused on Texas Instruments as a key US semiconductor...

headline: Equal Weighted Dividends Across 54 Stocks Deliver 24.7% Returns and Growing Payouts
summary: The AAM S&P 500 High Dividend Value ETF (NYSEARCA:SPDV) screens the S&P 500 for companies that pair above-average yields with above-average free cash flow, then equal-weights five names from each of ten sectors. SPDV functions as a future-aristocrats farm system, and the holdings list reads like one: a confirmed Dividend King, two near-aristocrats, and three ... headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on Texas Instruments, Raises Price Target to $360
summary: Stifel  analyst Tore Svanberg   maintains Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) with a Buy and raises the price target from $340 to $360.
